programme.title: How It Really Happened: James Jordan: Vanished
programme.desc: When in 1993, James Raymond Jordan Sr. goes missing and his luxury car is found stripped and abandoned in North Carolina, clues point to a tragic crime.

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: A Wall of Flames Part 1
programme.desc: A string of horrifying fires plagues California in the Eighties and Nineties, one of them fatally trapping four people inside. Are these raging infernos accidental or is someone setting them deliberately?

programme.title: Very Scary People: The Firestarter: Chasing a Pyromaniac Part 2
programme.desc: In a race against time, investigators hunt for an arsonist setting devastating fires across California. To their complete shock, the man responsible turns out to be none other than renowned fire investigator Captain John Orr.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Once Bitten
programme.desc: Ray Krone was known throughout Arizona as the snaggletooth killer. An unusual bite-mark on a murdered woman resulted in his conviction and death sentence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All Wet
programme.desc: When one woman's drowning death in Pennsylvania triggers another investigation into a woman's eerily similar death in North Carolina, medical examiners must determine if the women drowned or were in fact murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Shot of Vengeance

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bad Blood
programme.desc: A young doctor in a rural community is accused of sedating and sexually assaulting two of his female patients. DNA tests demonstrate that the doctor is innocent, but the women continue to insist that he sedated and raped them.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Wrong Foot
programme.desc: Illinois police discover a footprint on a birthday card that could lead to the home invader who killed a man and attacked two young girls.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Order Up
programme.desc: The murder of a prominent businessman in Colorado is particularly difficult to solve since the killers left virtually no forensic evidence at the scene.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Body of Evidence
programme.desc: Police exhume the body of a murdered woman to study bite wounds, which eventually lead to the killer.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Accident or Murder?
programme.desc: Police believed that a husband murdered his wife after they learn that he had taken out a life insurance policy on her shortly before she died. When an investigator recreates the fall, the results are surprising.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Crime Seen
programme.desc: After years in prison, Edward Honaker finally found someone who believed him, and was willing to pay for DNA testing which could prove he was innocent.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Speck of Evidence

programme.title: Forensic Files: Broken Bond
programme.desc: The story of nurse Tanya Reid who may have murdered her own baby and was planning to murder her son.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Out of the Ashes

programme.title: Forensic Files: Frozen in Time
programme.desc: A young women went missing for three years until someone called to report a suspicious truck in a driveway. The cold trail turned even colder when they found out what was being stored in the truck.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Cold Storage

programme.title: Forensic Files: Tooth or Consequences
programme.desc: An investigation into the disappearance of a young woman uncovers a tooth.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sniffing Revenge
programme.desc: Unexpected death appears to be foul play but that is refuted after autopsy is performed.

programme.desc: Bluey and Bingo want to play games on the trampoline with Dad; Dad, Bluey and Bingo head to the dump to throw away their rubbish; Bluey and Bingo play pretend zoo.

programme.title: NCIS: Under Covers
programme.desc: When the bodies of two assassins are delivered to NCIS from overseas, Tony and Ziva covertly assume their identities and engage in a sexy rendezvous at a luxury hotel in order to find their target.

programme.title: NCIS: Frame-Up
programme.desc: When a portion of a female body is found at Quantico, the NCIS team investigates and is shocked to discover that all the forensic evidence points to Tony as the prime suspect. Abby makes it her personal mission to prove Tony's innocence.

programme.title: NCIS: Probie
programme.desc: When McGee kills a man while on assignment, the NCIS team steps in to back him when they discover the man was an undercover police officer. Meanwhile, Tony gets a troublesome phone call from his past.

programme.title: NCIS: Model Behavior
programme.desc: Gibbs and the team investigate the murder of a supermodel filming a reality TV show on a marine base. At the start of the investigation, the team believes the model may have committed suicide but they uncover a twisted love triangle.

programme.title: NCIS: Boxed In
programme.desc: While searching a Senegalese ship that they believe is being used to smuggle firearms, Tony and Ziva are captured and locked in a container. Meanwhile, the team frantically tries to discover their whereabouts.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who
programme.desc: A suspicious person call turns into a murder investigation when Burgess and her temporary partner discover the body of a dead man in an SUV.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Alpha Dog
programme.desc: Goren and Eames uncover the sexual paranoia behind the murder of a hunky poster boy when he turns up dead after a night of sex and drugs with an unknown woman.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Major Case
programme.desc: After watching a neighbouring young girl, a lonely man offers her refuge when she is on the run from an irate drug dealer. She thanks him by kissing him, but things take a turn for the worse and the man kills her in a fit of rage.

programme.title: Law & Order: Criminal Intent: Delicate
programme.desc: When a promising ballerina dies at the New York conservatory, Nichols and Stevens uncover murder and betrayal in a place known for its art and beauty.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: You Never Know Who's Who
programme.desc: A suspicious person call turns into a murder investigation when Burgess and her temporary partner discover the body of a dead man in an SUV.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: One Dead Kid, a Notebook and a Lot of Maybes
programme.desc: Intelligence sets out to find a missing teenaged boy who they believe poses a serious threat to the students at his wealthy school after finding disturbing drawings in his notebook.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Forget My Name
programme.desc: When Intelligence follows up on a tip Antonio and Halstead received from a reliable informant about an upcoming drug trade, the team is shocked to discover the mutilated body of a man.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Never Forget I Love You
programme.desc: When the decapitated body of a woman found in Lake Michigan is connected to Voight's social circle, Lindsay fears his relationship with the group may hinder his ability to approach the case objectively.

programme.title: Chicago P.D.: Now I'm God
programme.desc: A doctor with personal connections to Voight is under investigation when four of his patients are committed to Chicago Med after an overdose of chemo.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Mother's Day Murder
programme.desc: A rowdy night out at a Chicago pub turns deadly when daybreak reveals a mutilated body. Police cross state lines as they try to track a killer, but it will take an unexpected call and a brutal betrayal to finally solve this case and find justice.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Party Crashers
programme.desc: Some college buddies crash a party in an idyllic Southern California town. But when alcohol flows and jealousy rages, the night turns deadly. The case goes cold for more than a decade before the truth is finally uncovered and justice is served.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Murder in the Heartland
programme.desc: After a night shift, an Indiana college student heads home. Hours later, and a mile away, her car is found abandoned. And when two horrifying discoveries are soon made, investigators wonder if they're dealing with a small town serial killer.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: Gambling With Death
programme.desc: An evening at a Mississippi casino turns into a nightmare when a beautiful wife and mother is abducted. When investigators uncover some startling truths the suspects are countless. But it's a shocking twist that finally leads to an unexpected arrest.

programme.title: Murdered by Morning: A Father's Plea
programme.desc: When a celebration starts to sour, tempers flare and someone vanishes. Days later, a body is discovered in an unsavory part of a Northern California town. When the case goes cold, it will take a most unexpected plea to finally catch a killer.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Movie: World War Z
programme.desc: A UN employee traverses the world in race against time to stop the Zombie pandemic that is toppling governments and armies and threatening to destroy humanity itself.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Father Knows Worst
programme.desc: When Homer observes Bart and Lisa struggling in certain aspects of their academic and social lives at school, he becomes a proponent of 'helicopter parenting,' the process of closely monitoring a child and forcing them to succeed.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Waverly Hills, 9021-D'Oh
programme.desc: When Marge learns Springfield Elementary is the worst school in the state, she and Homer rent an apartment in an upscale neighbourhood so Bart and Lisa can attend a better school. To boost Lisa's popularity, Bart tells everyone she's friends with a star.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Four Great Women and a Manicure
programme.desc: Marge and Lisa visit the nail salon where they engage in a spirited debate as to whether a woman can be smart, powerful and beautiful all at the same time. To prove their point, they spin four tales of famous women starring familiar Springfield faces.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Coming to Homerica
programme.desc: When Springfield receives an influx of unemployed workers from neighbouring Ogdenville, Mayor Quimby decides to close its borders and Homer sets up a border patrol group.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Homer the Whopper
programme.desc: Comic Book Guy casts Homer as the lead in 'Everyman,' a feature film based on a superhero who possesses the ability to take on the powers of every superhero in every comic he touches. Unfortunately, the studio hires a trainer to whip Homer into shape.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Bart Gets a 'Z'
programme.desc: When Mrs. Krabappel confiscates the students' cellphones, Bart leads an organized effort to stop her by spiking her coffee and watching her make a drunken fool of herself. Principal Skinner fires her and replaces her with a cool new teacher.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Great Wife Hope
programme.desc: The men and boys of Springfield become obsessed with Mixed Martial Arts, a sport where fighters inflict severe pain on one another. When Marge and her friends stage a protest, the show's promoter embraces the controversy and challenges Marge to a match.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Treehouse of Horror XX
programme.desc: Lisa is livid with Miss Hoover and, in a series of homages to classic Hitchcock stories, she sets out for deadly revenge. Krusty's fast-food sandwich transforms news anchor Kent Brockman into an enraged zombie. Also, Homer is impaled in Moe's tavern.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Devil Wears Nada
programme.desc: In an effort to raise money for charity, Marge and 'Philanthro-Chicks' decide to pose for a calendar. At the photo studio, Marge is reluctant to reveal skin, but the photographer loosens her up with wine and, before long, Marge is the talk of the town.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Pranks and Greens
programme.desc: Fed up with Bart's constant pranks, Principal Skinner tells Bart that there is a former Springfield Elementary student hailed as the best prankster ever. Bart tracks down the prankster and they become fast friends until Bart gets him a job.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Rednecks and Broomsticks
programme.desc: After getting lost in a game of hide-and-seek, Lisa wanders into the field and discovers three teenage girls who are practicing Wiccans. Just before Lisa joins them, Chief Wiggum arrests the three girls for witchcraft and Lisa becomes the trial witness.

programme.title: The Simpsons: O Brother, Where Bart Thou
programme.desc: One snowy day in Springfield, Lisa informs Bart that she and Maggie share a bond that Bart will never understand because he doesn't have a brother, so Bart asks Homer for a baby brother. When Homer turns him down, Bart heads to the orphanage.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Dennis Looks Like a Registered Sex Offender
programme.desc: Dennis is insulted when he is mistaken for a sex offender, because the real culprit is overweight.

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: The Gang Gets Whacked

programme.title: It's Always Sunny in Philadelphia: Bums: Making a Mess All Over the City
programme.desc: Mac and Dee do their part to try to keep the streets clean. Dennis and Frank pretend to be police officers and do not follow the rules.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Real Shawshank
programme.desc: An eerie prison with a dark past that became the setting of an iconic Hollywood movie and alien monoliths on a strange and remote island are deserted engineering projects, and new discoveries reveal how they were built and why they were abandoned.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Swamp of Despair

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: The Doom of El Dorado
programme.desc: The haunting remnants of a settlement in the Nevada desert lies scattered with decaying machinery and remains trapped in a bizarre time-warp; experts uncover a forgotten mine where dreams of discovering a fortune were met with chaos and murder.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Treasure of Outlaw Valley
programme.desc: Searching for a Gold Rush ghost town's legendary hidden treasure in the hills surrounding the town.

programme.title: Mysteries of the Abandoned: Fortress of Nuclear Secrets
programme.desc: Long, dome-like structures camouflaged by a rural landscape conceal the remains of concrete vaults with a hidden history. Experts investigate and uncover state-of-the-art bunkers built to conceal and protect a deadly nuclear secret.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Mystery of the Lost Labyrinth
programme.desc: A strange, centuries-old labyrinth built into an abandoned quarry was built by an eccentric millionaire, and no one knows why; but now, a new excavation into this mysterious 9,000-foot tunnel system might finally reveal its dark secrets.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Secrets of the Terror Tunnels
programme.desc: A vast system of tunnels built almost three thousand years ago was the site of the greatest battles of antiquity, and these disorienting passages could be the deadliest weapon in war. Experts reveal what made this underground world so terrifying.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Conspiracy in the Buried City
programme.desc: Residents devised an ingenious trick to keep the location of buried ancient city hidden five stories underground secret from invaders; experts reveal what it was, and using the latest tech, they reveal the truth behind this strange place.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: World's Biggest Labyrinth
programme.desc: The world's biggest labyrinth is a 1,553-mile cave system that's home to some of history's darkest mysteries, and new discoveries at this strange place reveal the long-lost secrets of Nazi occupation, Soviet revolution, and Cold War subterfuge.

programme.title: Underground Marvels: Curse of Cannibal Caves
programme.desc: A mysterious cave system is home to some of the oldest human remains ever discovered, and today, the explorers and researchers investigating this site are uncovering shocking evidence of cannibalism among its Ice Age denizens.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Animal Mummies: The Dark Truth
programme.desc: Ancient Egypt's animal mummies are one of antiquity's darkest mysteries, and today, innovative new imaging technology reveals what's inside these strange relics. The shocking truth challenges everything we know about worship in ancient Egypt.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Great Pyramid: The Lost Treasure
programme.desc: The recent discovery of an ancient Egyptian treasure offers new clues that could finally reveal how the Great Pyramid was built.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Ghosts of the Great Pyramid
programme.desc: Experts use a long-lost relic to bring the workers who built the Great Pyramid back to life, reshaping everything we know about ancient Egypt and its treasures.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Curse of the Catacombs
programme.desc: An underground labyrinth containing thousands of human skeletons is a dark mystery beneath the streets of Rome, and now, experts are using cutting-edge tech to reveal what killed them and why they were buried in this eerie place.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Riddle of the Olmecs
programme.desc: Deep in the jungles of Mexico, gigantic stone heads carve a hidden path to a Mesoamerican mystery; an intrepid expert follows the trail left by long-ago explorers to turn up new clues and reveal the secrets a lost ancient civilization.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Lost Relic of the Ice Age
programme.desc: An Ice Age relic found in a mysterious cave is evidence of prehistoric humans' connection to the supernatural.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Egypt's Atlantis: The New Treasures
programme.desc: After experts discover an ancient lost city off the coast of Egypt, the race to unearth its priceless relics and bring this mysterious sunken world back to life begins, revealing the doomsday event that caused it to sink into the sea.

programme.title: Secrets of the Lost: Skeleton of Cannibal Cave
programme.desc: A 10,000-year-old skeleton found deep in a mysterious cave points to dark mysteries from humankind's deep history; using cutting-edge DNA technology, experts investigate the latest evidence to shed new light on these prehistoric secrets.

programme.title: Grave Secrets: Bottom of the Stairs
programme.desc: Detectives called to the home of Ken and Kristine Fitzhugh learn that what was once considered an accidental fall is now being investigated as a homicide. They soon find themselves on the hunt for the real scene of Kristine's death... and for her killer.

programme.title: Dead Silent: All the Lights Were on
programme.desc: After getting engaged, Nikki Ansley takes a job at a local convenience store in order to pay for her upcoming nuptials. But her best-laid plans are horrifically derailed when two unwelcome customers show up right before closing time.

programme.title: The Wonderland Murders: Slippery Slope
programme.desc: 'Til Death Do Us Part" takes on a whole new meaning when a wife of thirty-four years loses the love of her life after he's kidnapped and she's nearly killed by his abductor. But nothing is what it seems in this gothic tale of murder, deceit and cover-up.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Tortured Hero
programme.desc: When a young Army veteran returns from war, his family is relieved to have him out of harm's way finally. But danger lurks closer to home when a brief encounter on a dating app leads to a devastating tragedy.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Never Let Her Go
programme.desc: A young woman far away from home finds herself increasingly isolated from her friends and family by the man she loves. As his efforts to control her intensify, she comes to realize that he will stop at nothing to keep her by his side.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Red Christmas
programme.desc: In December 2003, police respond to a mysterious 911 call at a home in the tony Walnut Estates in Mansfield, Texas. When authorities enter they discover two bloodied bodies. The key to finding the killer is within one of the victim's grasp.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Never Let Her Go
programme.desc: A young woman far away from home finds herself increasingly isolated from her friends and family by the man she loves. As his efforts to control her intensify, she comes to realize that he will stop at nothing to keep her by his side.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: Bible Belt Massacre
programme.desc: Two days before the new millennium, the Freeman family trailer is burned to the ground. The couple's remains are found with bullets to the head, but their teenage daughter and her friend are missing.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Delphi Killer
programme.desc: A quiet rural town is rocked when two middle-school girls go on a hike and are later found murdered. But when police discover one of the girls may have recorded her killer with her cellphone, the race is on to find the mysterious man.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Exposed
programme.desc: Three young girls meet a new friend online. Like other boys in the chat rooms, he's around their age, friendly, and flirtatious. Months later his demeanor shifts, trapping the girls in a vicious game from which they can't escape.

programme.title: Web of Lies: Divorced and in Danger
programme.desc: A divorcee turns to the internet for romance and soon meets a sexy entrepreneur. But when she's found brutally murdered in her own home, detectives discover that Sheila was lured into the dark world of S&M.

programme.title: Betrayed: Blood in the Water
programme.desc: Cathy Stroup is a no-nonsense Irish mom who knows what her family needs to survive. But the question is- how will she survive them?

programme.title: Betrayed: Death by Design
programme.desc: 27-year-old single mom Laura Ackerson is looking to make a fresh start in Raleigh, North Carolina. She starts a new company and new relationships while battling for custody of her two young children. She also meets her untimely demise.

programme.title: Murder Among Friends: Dear Friend, Dead Friend
programme.desc: In Manor, Pennsylvania, a fun-loving 25-year-old is gunned down on the railroad tracks. What first looks like a botched robbery is quickly reclassified as a brutal assassination, casting the victim's best friends as prime suspects.

programme.title: Deadly Devotion: Temple of Doom
programme.desc: 20-year-old Steve Bryant thinks he's found his calling among the peaceful, robe-wearing Hare Krishna community. But when he defies a despotic renegade guru, Bryant learns that ultimate devotion has a dark and deadly side.

programme.title: Love Kills: Damning Our Future
programme.desc: When Chance and Danielle first lock eyes, sparks fly. Both have a history of breaking the law. They fall madly in love and move in together with Danielle's young daughter. But when they can't pay their bills, they're lured back to a life of crime.

programme.title: Twisted Sisters: Go to Daddy
programme.desc: The black sheep of the family has spent a lifetime in the shadow of her prodigal younger sister. As the relationship with her mother takes a turn for the worse, things build to a boil that will leave one family member dead.

programme.title: Motives & Murders: Sheltered from the Truth
programme.desc: It's a September morning in 1973, and Debra Dill's bludgeoned body is discovered next to her car in rural Maine. Her grieving community wakes up to a nightmare, but it will take nearly two decades before the killer is behind bars.

programme.title: Stranger Among Us: Blood Red Reunion
programme.desc: After a long-lost daughter reunites with her family, their peaceful Florida neighborhood is devastated by scandal, betrayal, and a double-murder.

programme.title: 20/20 on ID: My Son Is Not a Monster
programme.desc: An 11-year-old's soon-to be step-mom is found murdered in their home. A child-sized shotgun, gun residue on his clothes, and a witness account all seem to point to the boy as the shooter.

programme.title: Scorned: Love Kills: Teacher's Pet
programme.desc: Professor Bill Douglas falls for high-end call girl Robin after his marriage to Nancy grows stale. But when Bill struggles to pay Robin and Nancy learns about the affair, the Professor is caught in a situation he can't lecture his way out of.

programme.title: Heart of Darkness: Gambling With The Devil
programme.desc: A woman is found dead in her car by her husband and son.

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates: The Springfield Three
programme.desc: On June 6, 1992, Suzie Streeter and Stacy McCall are out celebrating high school graduation. By morning, the teens are missing, along with Suzie's mother. The case leads police on a nationwide search as they work to solve this baffling mystery.

programme.title: Codes and Conspiracies: The Vatican
programme.desc: The Vatican is a secretive, watchful institution that protects its reputation and the members of its ranks with fierce, often reckless abandon. The secrets and scandals throughout its history are some of the darkest.

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot
programme.desc: An inquiry into whether Iran was really behind the Lockerbie Bombing, if the CIA invented and promoted suicide bombing in the Middle East, why there were no photos of Bin Laden's body and if 9/11 was actually an inside job.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Pearl Harbor
programme.desc: Experience the event that changed the war's course, hear the stories of those who were there and feel the momentum behind the attack that provoked the world's greatest superpower to join the Allied forces.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin
programme.desc: Survivors recount the horrors and strength behind surviving such a merciless place and the shock of Allied soldiers as they discover the evil secret of Germany's concentration camps.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Battle of Britain
programme.desc: The British begin to face the Germans over the buildings of London and other British towns, and brave young pilots give their all for the Ally cause.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of Berlin

programme.title: Chasing Conspiracies: The Lockerbie Plot

programme.title: Shadow Ops: Escape From Moscow
programme.desc: KGB Colonel turned double agent Oleg Gordievsky has spent ten years spying for Britain's secret service, MI6. Now the Soviets are on to him. His only hope for survival is to attempt a daring exfiltration plan.

programme.title: Air Aces: Wing Walker
programme.desc: The crew of Lancaster ME669 had one of the most dangerous jobs in the Air Force.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: Recreation
programme.desc: In this episode, we'll see how Hitler used the Olympic games to promote Nazism. How he controlled the leisure time and holidays of his Citizens by developing the world's largest travel agency. And how by constructing the world's biggest beach resort.

programme.title: Hitler's Empire: The Post-War Plan: America
programme.desc: In this episode we'll uncover support for the National Socialist movement within America, revealing outposts of Nazi Germany within the land of the free. We'll also learn about the man thought he believed he was the American Fuhrer.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Fall of France
programme.desc: First-hand accounts of the incredible sacrifices and momentous feats endured by the Allies alongside the devastating consequences of the German capture of France.

programme.title: World War II: Witness to War: Hell in the Pacific
programme.desc: The brave men and woman who fought along the tides of the Pacific share their stories. Both Japanese and U.S. forces face off with an intense determination and will to survive.

programme.title: Against the Odds: Fighting Fox: Road to Hell
programme.desc: The paratroopers of Fighting Fox Company, 2nd Battalion, 506th Parachute Infantry Regiment fought and died from Normandy to Hitler's Eagle's Nest. Their sheer determination against the enemy was matched only by their devotion to one another.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Gangs of New York
programme.desc: This notorious feud is one of the largest street wars in history. William Poole ('Bill the Butcher') rules New York's viciously anti-immigrant nativist gang, but the Bowery Boys challenge their hold.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Hatfields and McCoys
programme.desc: The Hatfields (Devil Anse) versus the McCoys (Randall) is one of the most notorious feuds in American history. What starts as Civil War hostility rapidly escalates to kidnapping, illicit love affairs, murder, and a nation-wide turf war.

programme.title: Blood Feuds: Yukon Gold Rush War
programme.desc: This epic Gold Rush showdown pits legendary conman Jefferson 'Soapy' Smith and his loyal 'Soap Gang' against town organizer-turned vigilante Frank Reid and the Committee of 101, in a battle to bring justice to the lawless Alaskan Frontier.

programme.title: Alcatraz: Beyond the Rock
programme.desc: The world's most famous prison holds many secrets. We'll explore a conspiracy that helped three inmates escape, reveal the truth behind the dungeon of Alcatraz, and discover the remnants of a mysterious military outpost with links to Abraham Lincoln.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Cabin for Future Generations
programme.desc: Mary wants the Cabin Masters to re-imagine the current footprint of the camp, and create additional bedroom/sleeping space while expanding the bathroom to accommodate their large family.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters
programme.desc: Builder Chase Morrill teams up with his brother, sister and best friend to save and transform abandoned cabins buried deep in the woods. They'll give these properties the facelift they've needed for decades. And you never know what you might find.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Dream Come True
programme.desc: A couple with five children calls on the Cabin Masters to take their newly purchased camp on David Pond and turn it into a family vacation cabin that will serve as a central part of their lives for generations to come.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: A Multi-Family Affair
programme.desc: Chase and the team have their hands full trying to repair and restore this diamond in the rough that's only accessible by hiking or by boating across the lake.

programme.title: Maine Cabin Masters: Passport to Greenville
programme.desc: A couple fell in love with the stunning views of Greenville Junction, Maine, but the cabin they purchased is in need of some serious work to make it livable year-round for their extended family.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Salvage Dawgs: Christiansburg House
programme.desc: The team travels down the road to Christiansburg to salvage an old home. They get some good meat and potatoes from the house, including the mantles, banisters and all the gingerbread trim. Also, Mike and Tay build a couch that can fit a Whiteside.

programme.title: Paid Program
programme.desc: Paid programming.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Raise the Roof
programme.desc: Tamara gets creative renovating an expansive 1950s ranch-style home. She updates the exterior with faux stone and adds another floor to the 3,000-square-foot home, but rain and an old fireplace force her to rethink her plans and budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Stairway to Master Suite Heaven
programme.desc: Tamara Day uses her 1,400-square-foot second-story addition to create three new bedrooms in a 1950 ranch home.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Corbels and Chaos
programme.desc: Tamara sees great potential in a 1938 cottage with an unusual layout, unfinished renovation and no front door. She constructs a cathedral ceiling and creates two cedar corbels for the entrance. The cost of an egress window may crack her budget.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Rhapsody in Beige
programme.desc: Tamara transforms a contemporary home on a large wooded lot that's devoid of any character. She installs huge windows to bring the outdoors inside, but she faces issues with resurfacing a fireplace veneer.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: A Pain in the Deck
programme.desc: Continuing renovations on a large and bland contemporary home, Tamara tackles the master suite and replaces lots of dated cabinetry to make a stylish bathroom. She also creates a home heater and an immense deck and patio.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: All About the Island
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a large 1905 colonial with seven sun porches. She overhauls an ugly kitchen and a dining room with tacky orange carpet, but unsupported floors and a strange noise during demo slow her plans and may cost her big money.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Catwalk Craziness
programme.desc: Tamara Day starts on a 1900 Kansas City Shirtwaist-style home containing a living room with a catwalk instead of a ceiling. She pulls up linoleum flooring and gives the damaged foyer staircase a facelift.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: When One Barn Door Closes
programme.desc: After restoring a fourth bedroom in the Shirtwaist home, Tamara creates a reading nook and closet to complete the room. Then the Kansas City weather creates a problem in the front yard, while two vanities might not fit in the master bath.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Bumming About the Plumbing
programme.desc: Tamara tackles a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist home that's short on bathrooms but not short on charm. She restores the front door, updates the fireplace and renovates the kitchen, but struggles with sewer and roof issues.

programme.title: Bargain Mansions: Mirror, Mirror on the Bathroom Wall
programme.desc: Tamara Day takes on a 1905 Kansas City Shirtwaist that has only one bathroom. She doubles the size of the walk-in closet and enlarges the master suite, but her hopes of updating the home's bedrooms start to sink when her contractor discovers a leak.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: High Altitude Hideout
programme.desc: Adventure seeker Joey Caiafa sets out to build a mountaintop hideout outside of Leadville, Colorado. He enlists the help of his friends and an architectural designer to trick out the solar-powered space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Hawaiian Hideaway
programme.desc: Innovative designer and builder Graham Hill sets out to transform a steep Maui jungle plot into a 600-square-foot, hi-tech dream home with multiple moving walls and other space-maximizing features.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Appalachian Underground
programme.desc: A husband surprises his wife with a family vacation home on the edge of a Tennessee rock quarry.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Streamside Cottage
programme.desc: Professional treehouse builder Michael 'Murph' Murphy wants to build a cottage retreat for his family in Washington. He enlists his friends to create a natural siding and a massive fishing net for lounging above the living space.

programme.title: Building Off the Grid: Colorado Crest
programme.desc: Builder Phil Parr heads to the wilderness of northern Colorado to build the ultimate off-grid tent. Far beyond simple nylon and poles, this lavish tent has a custom fabricated wooden frame, canvas shell and 650-square-feet of livable elegance.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Charlotte, North Carolina
programme.desc: Casey Webb charges into Charlotte, North Carolina, for three takes on Southern specialties. There's a cheesy chicken classic care of Korea, a time-honored institution's signature sandwich and the biggest walking taco in all the Carolinas.

programme.title: Man v. Food: Hall of Fame: Decadent Desserts
programme.desc: Casey's sojourn of sustenance has had no shortage of sweets, and now it's time to celebrate the best of the best. We're counting down the most decadent desserts in Man vs. Food history and inducting them into our Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Good Eats: Dis-Kabob-Ulated
programme.desc: Alton demystifies the kabob with spicy beef kabobs and vanilla lime pineapple skewers.

programme.title: Good Eats: Switched on Baklava
programme.desc: Phyllo dough can be finicky but host Alton Brown tames this difficult pastry to create that wonderfully layered dessert known as baklava.

programme.title: Good Eats: Flat Is Beautiful V
programme.desc: The secret to perfect thin and crispy wood-fired pizzas at home is revealed.

programme.title: Good Eats: Porterhouse Rules
programme.desc: Learn everything you need to know about porterhouses.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Aruba
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern takes a culinary tour of Aruba, where the climate is as warm as the people. He indulges in local favorites like hearty Dutch pea soup, comforting yet elegant seafood cazuela and sweet, buttery cashew cake.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Austin
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern uncovers the one-of-a-kind tastes of Austin, Texas, a city known for 'keeping things weird.' This city excels at meaty classics like barbecue brisket, Texas chili and 10-gallon-hat-sized chicken fried steak.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Reno
programme.desc: Andrew heads to Reno, NV, for a food scene that loves to entertain. He embraces Reno's small town pride as he savors homemade meatballs and ravioli, gets a taste of Basque culture and meets some forward-thinking chefs.

programme.title: The Zimmern List: Cleveland
programme.desc: Andrew visits Cleveland for a taste of the city's culinary comeback. He gets nostalgic at the West Side Market, discovers new classics in a 100-year-old food hall and swings by a neighborhood butcher shop that's earning rave reviews.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Southern Comfort Foods
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the comfort food of the South. He visits a historic cafe in Atlanta for fried chicken and a Memphis joint for ribs. Then he checks out biscuits in Nashville, frogmore stew near Charleston, SC, and shrimp and grits in Savannah.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Outer Banks
programme.desc: Andrew highlights the seafood lover's paradise of North Carolina's Outer Banks region. The unique location serves up dishes like blue crab, Hatteras clam chowder, baked oysters and other mouthwatering feasts born of the ocean.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Queens
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern visits NYC specifically to scope out Queens' multicultural gastronomy. From hand-ripped noodles to spicy Thai stir-fries, grilled Greek octopus to kosher icons like pastrami on rye.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations: Mississippi Delta
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the iconic soul food of the Mississippi Delta. From fried catfish and hushpuppies to smothered oxtails and decadent mud pie, the Deep South's down-home dishes soothe the soul.

programme.title: Grey's Anatomy: Fear (of the Unknown)
programme.desc: The doctors bid an emotional farewell to Cristina Yang. A possible act of terrorism rocks Seattle and causes chaos at the hospital. Meredith makes a life-changing decision, and one doctor receives shocking news.

programme.title: The Closer: Batter Up
programme.desc: Detectives investigate an attack on a gay man, who was beaten to death with a baseball bat while at a bar with his partner.

programme.title: The Closer: Good Housekeeping
programme.desc: An illegal immigrant's daughter is murdered; a cruel twist sends the investigation back to square one.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Under the Influence
programme.desc: A meddling television writer-producer accompanies Sanchez and Tao on a ride-along so he can get an inside look at the LAPD but the day gets quickly out of hand. Meanwhile, Rusty employs some unfair help when his teacher makes him re-write an essay.

programme.title: Major Crimes: I, Witness
programme.desc: The LAPD flies a material witness into Los Angeles to testify, but, in a horrible turn of events, the witness winds up as the key suspect in an entirely new murder.

programme.title: Major Crimes: D.O.A
programme.desc: The squad investigates a brutal murder, but they soon find that dark secrets are at the root of an apparent drug bust gone wrong.

programme.title: Major Crimes: Rules of Engagement
programme.desc: In a case that brings gang violence and social profiling to the forefront, things are not always as they seem. Meanwhile, Sharon offers Jack the opportunity to be a court-appointed attorney in the case.

programme.title: Major Crimes: The Deep End
programme.desc: The media goes into a frenzy over race relations when the body of a young Latino man is found at the home of a white award-winning swimming coach. Meanwhile, Flynn struggles with an emotional dilemma on the eve of his daughter's wedding.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Night of No Return
programme.desc: Lauren Spierer went for a night out with friends in June 2011. The college coed has never been seen since. But years later, the mystery deepens when another female student from the same university is found dead after another night on the town.

programme.title: Real Life Nightmare: Spring Break From Hell
programme.desc: 17-year-old Brittanee Drexel suddenly disappears from spring break in Myrtle Beach. She leaves a friend’s hotel and is never seen again. But the case comes alive when twisted and disturbing details start to emerge from a prison cell.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Knot for Everyone
programme.desc: In the mid-1980s, bodies of nude woman were found in remote hills of California. The police got a break when a known prostitute escaped an attacker and was able to identify him and his automobile. The suspect was 50-year-old Roger Kibbe.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Talking Skull
programme.desc: A mapmaker was surveying the grounds of a boy scout ranch when something caught his eye. At first, it appeared to be a turtle shell, but it proved to be a human skull.

programme.title: Forensic Files: When the Dust Settled
programme.desc: A union official is executed in his home after a strike by union membership, and no one in the neighborhood hears any gunshots.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Welcome Intrusion
programme.desc: Years after a man is hailed for shooting the man who allegedly criminally harassed him and murdered his wife after breaking into their home, new technologies force the police to reassess the case. A tragic tale soon becomes even more tragic in a new way.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Within Arm's Reach
programme.desc: A man accused of killing his estranged wife insists she committed suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Private Thoughts
programme.desc: An entire family found dead inside their burned-out home appears to be a murder-suicide.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Hair of the Dog
programme.desc: With no forensic evidence found at a murder scene, investigators were baffled. But they suspected that the victim's dog had witnessed the crime.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Breaking News
programme.desc: When a young reporter is murdered in her apartment, and the two suspects are cleared of any wrongdoing, police must turn to a databank of well over 8000 felons to catch the killer, leading to the first conviction in the U.S, based on this evidence.

programme.title: Forensic Files: All the World's a Stage
programme.desc: Police must investigate one of their own when a detective says his wife shot herself in the head. While he claims he called 911 as soon as he could, evidence makes police doubt the detective's story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Something's Fishy
programme.desc: Examining the cyanide-laced Excedrin killings of 1986, where two people died. When the killer was caught, theirs was the first conviction after federal laws against product tampering were instituted after the Chicago Tylenol murders.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Sealed With a Kiss
programme.desc: For more than a year, angry, hateful letters were sent to a first grade school teacher in a small town in Pennsylvania. When scientists analyzed the letters, they found evidence that the sender knew a lot about the victim.

programme.title: Forensic Files: With Every Breath
programme.desc: Investigators race to figure out what killed a couple on an Indian reservation in New Mexico, and discover that it was the dried feces of deer mice, which had become airborne and deadly.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Slippery Motives
programme.desc: While staying at a hotel in St. Louis, Missouri, a Louisiana woman drowns in a bathtub. Her husband claims it was an accident, but detectives are skeptical as they discover evidence of foul play.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Woman Scorned
programme.desc: When a young mother and her infant son are found dead in a cornfield, the obvious suspect is the husband and father of the victims. But some insects found on the bodies reveal a vital clue, as does a long, blonde hair found on the victims.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Voice From Beyond
programme.desc: When a decomposed body is found stuffed in a barrel, it's easy to presume murder. But the body had been placed in the barrel 30 years earlier.

programme.title: Forensic Files: House Call
programme.desc: A respected surgeon in an upscale waterfront apartment community is murdered.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Marathon Man
programme.desc: When a man's body is found near the ranch his family owns, his wife claims he went jogging. But police doubt that story.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Bio-Attack
programme.desc: A religious cult's bizarre plot to overthrow the government using germ warfare.

programme.title: Forensic Files: A Shot in the Dark
programme.desc: A woman is found dead of a gunshot wound and police conclude that she was murdered by her husband. Forensic scientists were able to piece together the clues and determine what really happened.

programme.title: Forensic Files: The Metal Business
programme.desc: Phillip Rouss' health declined, and doctors couldn't pinpoint the source of his illness.

programme.title: Forensic Files: Dressed to Kill
programme.desc: When a six-year-old girl disappears without a trace, the parents become prime suspects.

programme.title: Return to Amish: The Time Has Come
programme.desc: While questioning his own father's legitimacy, Jeremiah discusses having a baby with Carmela. Maureen and Rosanna are in awe of the rich English. Sabrina is afraid something is wrong with the baby, and she must head to the hospital alone due to COVID-19.

programme.title: Return to Amish: The DNA Test Request
programme.desc: After hours alone in labor, Sabrina must have an emergency C-section. Roseanna has had enough of hearing about Maureen's new beau, which leads to a heated fight. Still having doubts about his biological father, Jeremiah asks Dennis to take a DNA test.

programme.title: Say Yes to the Dress: Agree to Disagree
programme.desc: Francesca returns for a second visit, but her picky entourage may not let her choose the dress she loves. Brittany wants a non-traditional gown, but her mom is not on board. Samantha gets fitted for her reception dress, but the top is completely sheer.

programme.desc: Sometimes when Kleinfeld is closed the salon will specially open the doors for clients with unlimited budgets to have private appointments with their designers. Pnina Tornai meets individually with three budget-less brides for a record-breaking day.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: 1,000 Pounds to Freedom
programme.desc: Amy and Tammy go to Atlanta to meet Dr. Procter to discuss weight loss surgery. When they arrive, Dr. Procter gives Tammy a hefty weight loss goal before he will approve her for surgery, meanwhile the Dietician has more bad news for Amy.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Breaking Point

programme.desc: After a stressful first month of dieting, the sisters head back to Atlanta for their one-month check in with Dr. Procter to find out if they are on the right path to their weight goals. The results force Amy to make a difficult decision.

programme.title: 1000-lb Sisters: Wedding and Weigh-ins

programme.title: Monster in My Family: Killer Clown: John Wayne Gacy
programme.desc: Karen Kuzma, sister of John Wayne Gacy, comes out of the shadows to reveal intimate details of one of the world's most notorious serial killers. Joined by her daughter, Karen returns to her childhood home in Chicago to disclose formative events.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: The Night Stalker: Richard Ramirez
programme.desc: In one year, Richard Ramirez killed 13 people. In this episode, his ex sister-in-law and niece come to terms with the evil that existed in their family and meet Bill Cairns, who survived one of Richard's attacks, but has never fully recovered.

programme.title: Monster in My Family: DC Sniper: John Allen Muhammad
programme.desc: Mildred Muhammad, ex-wife of infamous 'DC Sniper' John Allen Muhammad, reveals how the man she loves disintegrated into a monster who threatens to kill her, including an interview from prison with Melissa Moore, Muhammad's teenage accomplice.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: James Scandirito
programme.desc: James Scandirito, Jr. takes to the stand to explain why he had to dismember and bury what he claims was his already-deceased father.

programme.title: Court Cam Presents Under Oath: George Burch
programme.desc: George Burch stands accused of the brutal murder of Nicole Vanderheyden, a mother of three. He takes the stand to argue his innocence and provide the jury with an alternative suspect.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A teenager sues her parents and a hilarious judge handles the argument of a sovereign citizen perfectly. Plus, hear chilling testimony from the mastermind of a murderous prison escape.

programme.title: Court Cam
programme.desc: A man impersonating a police officer wreaks havoc, and fists fly in the courtroom. Plus, a defender looks for justice and a pair of pants.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: The Needy and the Greedy
programme.desc: A behind the scenes look at the location that refused to let the Jokers film, Joe's injury from being thrown into a tower of cereal and why Q was called a 'loose cannon'.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Washed Up
programme.desc: How the phrase “rooty toot toot” became popular on set, which guy has recently cut his potato intake in half, and how Joe managed to cool off during his sweltering bikini car wash punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: To Hatch a Predator
programme.desc: A last-minute prop request that caused a scramble, where Murr’s fetching housecoat came from, and who was offered a job at the children’s museum following Q’s turtle punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Like a Boss
programme.desc: Learn why the slow-moving line at The Fast and the Furious ride made things harder for the guys, who officiated Joe's wedding, and why last-minute changes were needed for Murr's Tumblr punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: Find out which joker owned a bar in Staten Island, what had the crew crying laughing and whose dad grew up on a chicken farm.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Inside Jokes: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: Find out which joker has a bike but won't ride it in the city, how Murr gets around backstage while on tour and what Murr's building staff refused to do during his punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: You Dirty Dog
programme.desc: Four friends compete to embarrass each other in the ultimate hidden camera showdown.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Bachelor Party
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr pose as avant-garde photographers in a Staten Island park and get animated when pitching to a focus group.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Drive, Drive, Drive
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as receptionists in a waiting room. Later, a road trip will drive tonight's big loser to the brink of insanity.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Poetry Slammed
programme.desc: Joe, Sal, Q and Murr pose as documentary subjects and look for fights in a public park. Afterwards, one joker crashes a poetry slam.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Pity in Pink
programme.desc: Murr, Joe, Q and Sal get a little too greedy with fellow shoppers at the market and then offer disservices to a focus group. Tonight's loser learns that the grass is always pinker on the other side.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Prince and Me
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q dig deep into the past lives of strangers and then enlist volunteers to craft the perfect email. Tonight's loser ends up with an identity crisis.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: Firefighter's Ball (Part Two)
programme.desc: Things go off the rails for the crew as the Ball rages on. Teddy and Eddie find themselves stuck in an elevator, Ike deals with a drunk Andy, while Lucy struggles to find alone time with her date.

programme.title: Tacoma FD: To Nightmare Manor
programme.desc: The crew answers a call at a haunted house. While they search for the source of the fire, each of them is forced to confront their greatest fears.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Full Mental Jacket
programme.desc: Joe, Murr, Q and Sal send blood pressure rates sky-high while posing as nurses, then stroll through the store with their wives. Plus, the big loser wishes he could check out early at a pop-up fashion show.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Tipping Point
programme.desc: Sal, Murr, Joe and Q pull desk duty, and then do strangers a solid by barring them from the bathroom. Plus, the big loser learns the hard way that gratuity is not included.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: The Closer
programme.desc: Q, Joe, Sal and Murr get tech help from some confused tutors, then play hot potato in a shoe store. Plus, the big loser wishes he could press 'escape' during a brutal coffee shop punishment.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Crash Test Dummies
programme.desc: Murr, Sal, Joe and Q take some customers for a wild ride, and things get messy when they ask fellow shoppers for a hand. Plus, the big losers suffer a monster punishment that leaves them crushed.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Autograph Corrector
programme.desc: The guys rely on the kindness of strangers to help answer some awkward questions, then go looking for love in the park. Plus, tonight's big loser strikes out amongst baseball fans with an assist from Yankees legend Tino Martinez.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Dropping Knowledge
programme.desc: The guys pump the breaks on a bike ride to ask perplexed strangers for help and cut the java line to get the go-ahead on some very strange emails. Plus, tonight's big loser gets schooled in a game show that barely makes the grade.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Chick Magnet
programme.desc: The guys turn on the charm to make a restaurant basement sound enticing and recruit unsuspecting shoppers to shout out bizarre nicknames. Then, tonight's big loser must find his way out of the cuckoo's nest before the chicks get crazy.

programme.title: Impractical Jokers: Like a Boss
programme.desc: The jokers act fast and furiously as employees at a theme park and go postal on model citizens who don't realize they're part of the picture. Then, tonight's big loser tumbles and falls after antagonizing a room full of Guy Fieri fans.

programme.title: The Pioneer Woman: The Way Things Used To Be

programme.desc: A homeowner seeks Leslie and Lyndsay's help to sell her inconsistently styled midcentury modern house. By decking out a dreamy backyard oasis and trimming trees to show off the water and mountain vista, the twins clear the way for a high sales price.

programme.title: Bargain Block: Desert Modern and Mid-Century Museum

programme.title: Bargain Block: Detroit Pride and Weird House

programme.desc: When a Burger Clown franchise opens next door, Cricket tries to prove to Bill that he can eat fast food for every meal with no ill effects. Then, Tilly and Cricket debate whether the lives of people in Big City are intertwined.

programme.desc: Remy uses Cricket's antics to gain views and likes on a new video-sharing app. Then, When Cricket and Tilly learn that Gloria has an internship at the animation studio that produces their favorite cartoon, they beg her to bring them for a visit.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Good Husband
programme.desc: A forty-year-old man was found dead in his car. Initially, there was no obvious medical explanation for Tom's death but when police uncovered a love triangle, this tragedy quickly turned into a tangled mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Lost and Found
programme.desc: A 4 year old girl abducted and raised by her kidnapper spends decades trying to get back home and she finally does. Her story had many ups and downs but the ending was extraordinary. As it turns out that ending was only the beginning.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Mystery of the Murdered Major
programme.desc: He was a military man, a respected Major in the US Army. When he was attacked in the middle of the night, police launched an investigation that would reveal wild secrets that might hold the key to murder.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House in the Woods
programme.desc: A hockey player finds his wife murdered in their home. His daughter says she saw a robber, but the killer's identity turns out to be far more complicated. Police had their suspects but her family had questions of their own.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Goldfinger Mystery
programme.desc: A couple made a fortune in gold, but money didn't buy happiness. They were headed for divorce when she was murdered. He was on tape, not at the crime scene, but police thought the video held the key to unlocking a mystery.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: A Dangerous Man
programme.desc: An investigation into the mysterious murder of a businessman exposes a tangled web of evil that extends from the Pacific Northwest into the North Dakota oil patch.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The Player
programme.desc: A double murder revealed a double life. The victims were a well-respected couple. Their son played poker for a living. His alibi was his ace in the hole. But when detectives found key evidence, they thought they were holding all the cards.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Frantic
programme.desc: After Christina, the twenty-three-year-old fashionista, went out to a high-end shopping mall on a Friday night and vanished police questioned everyone. The friends she was with. Her ex-model boyfriend.

programme.title: Lockup: Oakland Extended Stay: The New Girl
programme.desc: Deputies respond to rising tensions in a female housing unit; a popular rapper, whose ups and downs have been chronicled in the Oakland media, now faces serious charges; a grandmother, convicted of a mortgage scam, finds her place in the inmate hierarchy.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Young Deadly Love
programme.desc: A young man calls 911 to report his fiancé fatally shot herself in their bed. Her family insists she would never take her own life. The investigation drags on for years until an unexpected development leads to a stunning conclusion.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Blood Betrayal
programme.desc: A young father is found with a fatal gunshot wound. The authorities say it’s suicide but his family knows he would never take his own life. A mother and daughter fight for nearly 40 years to reveal the truth with the help of a dedicated police chief.

programme.title: Accident, Suicide, or Murder: Blood and Justice
programme.desc: When a former cop discovers his wife shot to death, authorities believe it’s suicide. But her family fights back, turning the Texas justice system upside down.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Unimaginable
programme.desc: The case made national headlines: A toddler left in the car for seven hours while his dad was at work. Was this a heartbreaking accident? Police said it was murder. Could any parent ever do this on purpose?

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: The House on the Lake
programme.desc: Stranger than fiction, a mom suddenly vanished. A dad under suspicion. There was no body, no weapon, no eyewitness and surprises along the way. Now, after all the twists and turns of four murder trials, the final verdict is in.

programme.title: Dateline: Secrets Uncovered: Betrayed
programme.desc: Melissa Lewis disappeared leaving signs of a struggle and a strange orange mist behind her. Later, her boss went missing and left behind an even bigger mess, including a missing fortune. Two crimes leaving one lingering mystery.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: A Deadly Con
programme.desc: A navy veteran is brutally stabbed in his senior living community. As detectives work to find the killer, they discover a persuasive con artist. Could this scammer have graduated from fraud to murder?

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Deadly Delivery
programme.desc: When a town councilwoman is gunned down in her home, the only evidence left behind is a bouquet of plastic roses. As detectives work to find the triggerman, they learn that the person calling the shots is closer to home than they originally thought.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Devil in Delaware
programme.desc: A quiet town is rocked to its core when a brutalized corpse of a single father is discovered by the side of a residential road. Detectives are led down an unexpected path of betrayal, lies, manipulation and murder amongst friends.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: The Will to Kill
programme.desc: A retired farmer thinks he's struck gold after natural gas is found on his property. When he’s found dead and a family feud breaks out over his estate, detectives uncover a tale of lies, deceit and manipulation orchestrated by someone close to home.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Navy Nightmare
programme.desc: After the wife of a naval officer is shot dead in a parking lot, the case quickly hits a dead end. It's not until years later that a heinous murder plot unravels involving power, greed and deadly ambition by a mastermind willing to risk everything.

programme.title: Mastermind of Murder: Secrets in the Canyon
programme.desc: A tragic car accident on a canyon road becomes a murder investigation when detectives discover possible foul play. What follows is a torrid tale of love, control, and unimaginable betrayal with a person close to home pulling the strings in a plot to kill.

programme.title: Snapped: Marjorie Armstrong
programme.desc: A bizarre bombing, a body in a freezer and a jilted boyfriend lead police to a woman with a notorious past.

programme.title: Snapped: Verina Childs
programme.desc: A hunter's death has authorities tracking a killer, but the trail leads surprisingly close to home.

programme.title: Movie: The House With a Clock in Its Walls
programme.desc: A 10-year-old orphan sent to live with his uncle learns that magic is real, and that his uncle is a warlock. He begins learning magic, but when he uses it to impress a classmate he accidentally releases a great evil that threatens the entire world.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Thursdays With Abie
programme.desc: Grampa is sitting on a bench waiting for his family when a man named Marshall Goldman approaches him and asks to hear about his life. Grampa tells Goldman about the time he was on a battleship, which was hit by an enemy torpedo.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Once Upon a Time in Springfield
programme.desc: Krusty is approached by two network executives who want to bring in a female co-star to increase the show's female demographic. The rapport between Krusty and Princess Penelope grows, and before long, Krusty proposes to her.

programme.title: The Simpsons: Boy Meets Curl
programme.desc: The Simpsons head to the 2010 Vancouver Games. Marge and Homer take up curling and end up competing in the Olympic trials. Meanwhile, Lisa becomes hopelessly addicted to collecting Olympic pins.

programme.title: The Simpsons: The Color Yellow

programme.title: The Simpsons: Stealing First Base
programme.desc: Principal Skinner announces that Mrs. Krabappel was called out of town and budget cuts dictate that, until she returns, the school's two fourth grade classes will merge. Bart reluctantly shares a desk with Nikki and develops a flirtatious rapport.

programme.title: Family Guy: Boy (Dog) Meets Girl (Dog)

programme.title: Family Guy: The Woof of Wall Street

programme.title: Unearthed: Dead Sea Scrolls: The Dark Truth
